## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between fwd.digital and Human Signal for content strategy and creation, facilitated by Unusual Ventures.](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth, raising Series A funding and onboarding high-profile clients](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Human Signal is pivoting from technical/product focus to targeting business executives, seeking content strategy support](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers a 90-day pilot ($9k/month) followed by a 12-month agreement, with Feb 27th as earliest kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in moving forward, with next steps including an SLW from fwd.digital and potential involvement from Unusual Ventures in Human Signal's funding round](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Current Status and Growth

  - [Raising Series A funding with significant investor interest (Battery, Kleiner Perkins)](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [18 contracts out for signature](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [New high-profile clients: Hims, Webflow, Superhuman, Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with John (Unusual Ventures) regarding funding round](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Strategy Process

  - [Comprehensive research workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Company analysis, persona identification, competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Keyword research and traffic potential estimation](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Content planning and execution with editor involvement](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Examples shared: Ramp ($27k/month contract), Webflow, Superhuman](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Emphasis on delivering value from day zero](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Use of AI and automation for research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### Human Signal's Content Needs

  - [Pivoting from PLG motion with open-source community to targeting product/engineering leaders](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Focus on AI-native companies where quality is critical (e.g., healthcare, user engagement, content moderation)](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Need to validate hypotheses for 4-5 key use cases/verticals](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Recent creation of a 24-page deep dive whitepaper as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Engagement Details and Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital offering:](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [90-day pilot at $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [Flexible opt-out during pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [12-month agreement post-pilot](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Earliest kickoff available: February 27th](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Process includes:](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
      - [Pre-kickoff research](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [Strategy formulation and validation (Week 1-2)](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [Content calibration and initial publishing (Week 3-4)](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
      - [Expectation to see traffic growth signals by month 3, inflection curves by month 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SLW (Statement of Work) to Scott and Penny by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Scott/Penny to forward SLW to Human Signal team (Michael and CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Marcel to create new Slack channel including Human Signal team](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Scott to provide Lauren's contact for Slack channel addition](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Marcel to reach out to John (Unusual Ventures) regarding potential investment](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Schedule meeting between Marcel and John for Tuesday next week](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Penny to potentially introduce another company (Paxton) to fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/D79Y1vFd4YKWxHrcC-4PQPFYQtaeyxop?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
